original_image_tags: Aged, off-white paper document, likely the back of a file folder or a routing slip. The paper shows wear, with two punch holes at the bottom and a torn corner at the bottom left. Two blue ink stamped impressions are visible at the top. There is also a very faint, illegible purple ink mark or stamp in the lower right quadrant.

elements.description: Aged paper document back with two blue ink reception stamps. The left stamp reads 'RECEIVED', 'JUL 23 9 51 AM', 'INTERNAL SECURITY', 'F.B.I.', 'DEPT. OF JUSTICE'. The right stamp reads 'Jul 11 3 24 PM '47', 'RECEIVED-LADD', 'F.B.I', 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE'. The page shows wear, two punch holes, and torn edges at the bottom left.

judge.reason: Description B provides specific, verbatim text from two blue stamps that Description A claims are 'illegible,' creating a direct contradiction on the readability and content of the same visual elements.
